Tool Call: retrieve("SMAD6 gene variants association with craniosynostosis")

Based on the retrieved evidence, SMAD6 variants have been specifically associated with non-syndromic craniosynostosis, especially in sagittal and metopic types, due to disruption of BMP signaling. Multiple sources confirm SMAD6 mutations are among the known genetic contributors to craniosynostosis, making a strong clinical link evident. \boxed{\text{A}}
